executives.name: Eugene Reilly
executives.background: Vice Chairman since January 2023. Previously served as Chief Investment Officer.

executives.name: Hamid Moghadam
executives.background: Co-founder of Prologis and has served as CEO since 1997. He was previously Chairman and CEO of AMB Property Corporation.

executives.name: Jeffrey Skelton
executives.background: Former Managing Partner of Caxton Associates. Expert in finance and risk management.

executives.name: Timothy Arndt
executives.background: Chief Financial Officer since April 2022. Previously served as Treasurer and Head of Corporate Capital Markets.
